title: calla elliottiana
intro: Calla elliottiana, also known as the Golden Calla or Wild Calla, is a plant species belonging to the Calla family, characterized by its yellow-green flowers and glossy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various skin conditions. The health benefits of Calla elliottiana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as a natural antibacterial agent. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer its medicinal properties and health benefits.
